column_description: Population name with local watershed context.
Pacific Fishery Management Area code for the population.
Local stream, tributary, or river name used in the source workbook.
Analysis year associated with the escapement estimate.
Species code from the NuSEDS source workbook (Coho in this slice).
Run timing category from the NuSEDS source workbook.
Estimated count of natural-origin adult spawners used for this official two-year Fraser coho slice.
Analytical method used to derive the estimate.
Classification assigned to the escapement estimate.
Stage of estimate publication or readiness.
Start date of the survey or observation window.
End date of the survey or observation window.
Watershed code associated with the population or observation area.
